subparts.text: Explain the Systematic Model of training. 5 C01
Name any two factors influencing trainee motivation.. 5 C02
Differentiate between CIRO and CIPP models of evaluation. 5 C03
Describe the role of assessment centers in training. 5 C04

questions.question_text: Suppose a company is facing a high turnover rate. How can the concept of a learning organization help? C01
You are hired as a training consultant for a startup. How would you align training with organizational change? C01
You are designing a training program for sales executives. How would you ensure the training objectives align with business goals? C02
A manager reports that trainees are not applying new skills on the job. How would you improve the transfer of training? C02
As a trainer, how would you adapt your methods to a team with mixed learning styles? C03
After a workshop, participants gave low feedback scores. What evaluation model would you use to identify gaps? C03
A mid-sized firm wants to shift to online learning platforms. How would you introduce e-learning effectively? C04
Design a management development plan for newly promoted team leads using any three methods discussed. C04
